The '''Battle over Coruscant''' was a major battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in orbit of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The battle led to the destabilization of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] under [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] rule.

==Prelude==
[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] had been sent into [[Xizor's Palace]] under the guise of the deceased bounty hunter [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]]. [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] uncovered her plot and subsequently detained her. A small team consisting of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Benedict Vidkun]] avoided the palace's security by entering the palace through the [[Sewers of Coruscant]]. Vidkun, a worker hired to guide them through the sewers, suddenly turned on the group, but Dash killed him. Meanwhile, Luke found Leia, and Rendar planted [[Pulse bomb/Legends|pulse bombs]] on Xizor's [[sky elevator]] connecting his palace to the ''[[Falleen's Fist]]'' in orbit. Security pinned the group down during the escape. Lando retaliated by throwing a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] into the sewer shaft. With a thermal detonator in the sewer and pulse bombs on the elevator, Xizor's Palace had to be evacuated in five minutes. Most of the population of the building escaped. The royal guards and Xizor fled to ''[[Falleen's Fist]]'', Xizor's personal [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]].

==Battle in orbit==
Dash Rendar, Leia Organa, Luke Skywalker, Chewbacca, and Lando Calrissian fled the building in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Dash transferred to the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']], and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] due to a distress signal sent by [[LE-BO2D9|Leebo]]. Three rebel pilots were killed, and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] was gaining an advantage.

[[File:Battle_of_Falleens_Fist.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] takes part in the battle.]]
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], in the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], came around [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with two Star Destroyers, deployed squadrons of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] fighters, and ordered his fleet to attack Xizor's personal navy. Xizor, outraged, asked what was going on, but instead, Darth Vader gave Xizor two minutes to surrender or be killed. Xizor ignored Vader's ultimatum, and the ''Executor''{{'s}} turbolasers destroyed the skyhook, which violently exploded and killed everyone on board.

Meanwhile, even as the Imperial forces were hitting the skyhook, the ''Outrider'' entered the skyweb, its interior, in order to damage its infrastructure<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire video game">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]</ref> and gain the satisfaction that he caused its destruction himself.<ref name="secrets">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', Part 4: Battle Zones, IV. The Final Battle</ref>

[[File:HB_SotE_skyhook_death.jpg|thumb|right|The ''Executor'' destroys Xizor's Skyhook, with Xizor in it.]]
Dash Rendar appeared to be killed when the ''Outrider'' was hit by debris from the explosion, but this was a trick, and he survived the battle. He left the Alliance afterward.

==Aftermath==
Rogue Squadron moved onto [[Prefsbelt IV/Legends|Prefsbelt IV]] to deliver the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] to the Alliance, and Luke and company went to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the first general outline of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] project, [[Steve Perry]] wrote that the Rebels, including the ''Outrider'', left the battle before the destruction of the skyhook; this was changed in order to include Dash Rendar's "loss" and add a dramatic finale to the story.<ref name="secrets" />
